reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Dungeon shaft palette, cold stone texture, vertical pressure mood, and obstacle rhythm anchor.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player
reference_images.purpose: Prisoner silhouette, fall pose, cloth volume, and shackle readability anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteBundle for the static vent marker and pair it with a separate trigger volume that applies additional downward speed.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_wind_vent_static_16x16.png through AssetServer during hazard setup.
runtime_notes: Trigger volume adds 200 px per second of downward force while the player overlaps it.
The static sprite stays aligned to the wall tile grid.
Visual cue remains readable even when the player crosses the vent quickly.

context.usage: Vent source that marks a local downward force zone and warns the player that free-fall speed will increase.

shape.silhouette: Square wall vent with four slats, a dark cavity, and a pale airflow arrow motif.

specs.material: Cold steel vent inset into stone wall.

acceptance_criteria: Four vent slats remain open and readable at a 4x scale.
The airflow arrow uses a cooler highlight than the surrounding frame, separating the hazard cue from wall tiles.
